acds_client_config_t(3) Library Functions Manual acds_client_config_t(3)

NAME

acds_client_config_t - ACDS client connection configuration.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/acip/acds_client.h>

Data Fields


char server_address [256]
ACDS server address (e.g., discovery.ascii.chat"or127.0.0.1). uint16_t server_port
ACDS server port (default: 27225). uint32_t timeout_ms
Connection timeout in milliseconds. parallel_connect_should_exit_fn should_exit_callback
void * callback_data

Detailed Description

ACDS client connection configuration.

Definition at line 109 of file acds_client.h.
